Buffs.buffList: Arctic Howl, EternalRage, Freezing Mark, Herald of Ice, Ice Bite, Lunar Assault, Rage, Voltaic Mark
Buffs.curseList: Frost Bomb, Elemental Weakness, Freezing Mark
